title: A549 maintenance (ATCC)
description: Adherent A549 (ATCC CCL-185) in F-12K + 10% FBS, split 1:3 to 1:8, feed 2 to 3x per week. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-185

payload.description: Routine maintenance of adherent A549 lung carcinoma cells per the ATCC CCL-185 product sheet. Complete growth medium: ATCC-formulated F-12K Medium (ATCC 30-2004) + 10% FBS. Subcultivation ratio 1:3 to 1:8; medium renewal 2 to 3 times per week; maintain between 6 x 10^3 and 6 x 10^4 cells/cm^2. Rinse with D-PBS, then dissociate with Trypsin-EDTA (ATCC 30-2101), 5 to 15 min. 37 C, 5% CO2. ECACC advises seeding at 2 to 4 x 10^4 cells/cm^2 and passaging sub-confluent (70 to 80%). Doubling time is not published, so it is omitted. Sources: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-185 ; ECACC https://www.culturecollections.org.uk/products/celllines/generalcell/detail.jsp?refId=86012804&collection=ecacc_gc

cell_line.name: A549
cell_line.notes: ATCC CCL-185. Grow at 37 C, 5% CO2. Serum is fetal bovine serum (ATCC 30-2020) at 10%. Source: https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-185

media.base_medium: F-12K Medium (Kaighn's modification of Ham's F-12), ATCC 30-2004

planned_events.notes: Seed day. Rinse with D-PBS, add 2 to 3 mL Trypsin-EDTA (ATCC 30-2101), disperse 5 to 15 min, quench, count, and reseed (ECACC: 2 to 4 x 10^4 cells/cm^2).
Renew medium (ATCC: 2 to 3 times per week).
Subculture sub-confluent. Maintain between 6 x 10^3 and 6 x 10^4 cells/cm^2.
